summary.confirmHint: Confirm the transactions in the app — the "Pending confirmation" section.

start.noToken:
Hi! I import bank notifications into your finance app.

Link your account: open the app → Profile → Telegram import → "Connect".
start.linked: ✅ Account linked! Now forward me a bank notification — I'll turn it into a transaction.
start.invalidToken: ⚠️ The link has expired or was already used. Generate a new one in the app.
start.alreadyLinkedOther: ⚠️ This Telegram is already linked to another account. Unlink it there first.

notLinked: First link your account: app → Profile → Telegram import → "Connect".
